case_title: TUAN ANH NGUYEN VS. REX BISERRA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-20-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-20-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY NGOC NGUYEN AS VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT AND WAIVED SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, TUAN ANH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BISERRA, REX STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, TUAN ANH AS TO DEFENDANT BISERRA, REX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2016 - JUDGMENT.
